scenes.voiceText: Good morning, writing room.,Nothing from you, as usual. Another day, another blank page.
scenes.visualPrompt: Max sipping coffee, staring at a blank script
scenes.shotNotes: Animate Morning Routine with Slow zoom into Max's face. Use visual prompt as frame guidance and keep continuity with [object Object].
scenes.cameraPlan: Start wide, move to medium performance coverage, end on a detail or reaction for Morning Routine.
shots: Shot A: Establish Morning Routine with Max sipping coffee, staring at a blank script.
Shot B: Push motion with Slow zoom into Max's face.
Shot C: Land on the strongest acting beat tied to coffee brew.

scenes.voiceText: Ah, finally! You're talking to me.,Now we can get this show on the road. The writing room has come to life!
scenes.visualPrompt: The writing room's walls crackle to life
scenes.motionPrompt: Quick cut between Max looking confused and the writing room's lights flickering
scenes.shotNotes: Animate The Writing Room Awakens with Quick cut between Max looking confused and the writing room's lights flickering. Use visual prompt as frame guidance and keep continuity with [object Object].
scenes.cameraPlan: Start wide, move to medium performance coverage, end on a detail or reaction for The Writing Room Awakens.
shots: Shot A: Establish The Writing Room Awakens with The writing room's walls crackle to life.
Shot B: Push motion with Quick cut between Max looking confused and the writing room's lights flickering.
Shot C: Land on the strongest acting beat tied to electricity zaps.

scenes.voiceText: You're just a tool, but I'm the one who brings life!,Don't get too full of yourself. The lines between creator and creation blur.
scenes.visualPrompt: Max and the writing room engaged in a heated discussion
scenes.motionPrompt: Slow pan across Max's face, then to the writing room's walls
scenes.shotNotes: Animate Confronting Creativity with Slow pan across Max's face, then to the writing room's walls. Use visual prompt as frame guidance and keep continuity with [object Object].
scenes.cameraPlan: Start wide, move to medium performance coverage, end on a detail or reaction for Confronting Creativity.
shots: Shot A: Establish Confronting Creativity with Max and the writing room engaged in a heated discussion.
Shot B: Push motion with Slow pan across Max's face, then to the writing room's walls.
Shot C: Land on the strongest acting beat tied to argumentative murmurs.

windowsScript.content:
@echo off
setlocal
mkdir "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes" 2>nul
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "Good morning, writing room.,Nothing from you, as usual. Another day, another blank page." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/scene_01_morning-routine_voice.wav" --scene "01"
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "Ah, finally! You're talking to me.,Now we can get this show on the road. The writing room has come to life!" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/scene_02_the-writing-room-awakens_voice.wav" --scene "02"
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "You're just a tool, but I'm the one who brings life!,Don't get too full of yourself. The lines between creator and creation blur." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/scene_03_confronting-creativity_voice.wav" --scene "03"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "01" --visual "Max sipping coffee, staring at a blank script" --motion "Slow zoom into Max's face" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/scene_01_morning-routine_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/scene_01_morning-routine.mp4"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "02" --visual "The writing room's walls crackle to life" --motion "Quick cut between Max looking confused and the writing room's lights flickering" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/scene_02_the-writing-room-awakens_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/scene_02_the-writing-room-awakens.mp4"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "03" --visual "Max and the writing room engaged in a heated discussion" --motion "Slow pan across Max's face, then to the writing room's walls" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/scene_03_confronting-creativity_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/scene_03_confronting-creativity.mp4"
python build_concat_manifest.py --job "b4d21be08757a19d7eb1e0e2" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/episode_concat.txt"
ffmpeg -y -f concat -safe 0 -i "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/episode_concat.txt" -c:v libx264 -pix_fmt yuv420p -c:a aac -b:a 192k "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/the-writing-room-wakes_final_episode.mp4"
echo Episode build complete.
endlocal

bashScript.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes"
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "Good morning, writing room.,Nothing from you, as usual. Another day, another blank page." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/scene_01_morning-routine_voice.wav" --scene "01"
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "Ah, finally! You're talking to me.,Now we can get this show on the road. The writing room has come to life!" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/scene_02_the-writing-room-awakens_voice.wav" --scene "02"
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "You're just a tool, but I'm the one who brings life!,Don't get too full of yourself. The lines between creator and creation blur." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/scene_03_confronting-creativity_voice.wav" --scene "03"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "01" --visual "Max sipping coffee, staring at a blank script" --motion "Slow zoom into Max's face" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/scene_01_morning-routine_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/scene_01_morning-routine.mp4"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "02" --visual "The writing room's walls crackle to life" --motion "Quick cut between Max looking confused and the writing room's lights flickering" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/scene_02_the-writing-room-awakens_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/scene_02_the-writing-room-awakens.mp4"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "03" --visual "Max and the writing room engaged in a heated discussion" --motion "Slow pan across Max's face, then to the writing room's walls" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/scene_03_confronting-creativity_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/scene_03_confronting-creativity.mp4"
python build_concat_manifest.py --job "b4d21be08757a19d7eb1e0e2" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/episode_concat.txt"
ffmpeg -y -f concat -safe 0 -i "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/episode_concat.txt" -c:v libx264 -pix_fmt yuv420p -c:a aac -b:a 192k "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/the-writing-room-wakes_final_episode.mp4"
echo 'Episode build complete.'

voiceCommands: python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "Good morning, writing room.,Nothing from you, as usual. Another day, another blank page." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/scene_01_morning-routine_voice.wav" --scene "01"

python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "Ah, finally! You're talking to me.,Now we can get this show on the road. The writing room has come to life!" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/scene_02_the-writing-room-awakens_voice.wav" --scene "02"

python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "You're just a tool, but I'm the one who brings life!,Don't get too full of yourself. The lines between creator and creation blur." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/scene_03_confronting-creativity_voice.wav" --scene "03"
renderCommands: python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "01" --visual "Max sipping coffee, staring at a blank script" --motion "Slow zoom into Max's face" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/scene_01_morning-routine_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/scene_01_morning-routine.mp4"

python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "02" --visual "The writing room's walls crackle to life" --motion "Quick cut between Max looking confused and the writing room's lights flickering" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/scene_02_the-writing-room-awakens_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/scene_02_the-writing-room-awakens.mp4"

python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "03" --visual "Max and the writing room engaged in a heated discussion" --motion "Slow pan across Max's face, then to the writing room's walls" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/scene_03_confronting-creativity_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wakes/scene_03_confronting-creativity.mp4"
executionNotes: Run voice generation first so every scene gets a concrete WAV asset.
Run the renderer second so each scene produces its own MP4 file in the job output directory.
Run the ffmpeg concat build last to assemble the final episode from the rendered scene clips.
